name: Diabetic Gyros
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Ground beef or lamb or both
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except pita bread, combining well and kneading until the mixture is stiff.
2. On a skewer, pack meat mixture about 5-inch long and not more than 2 inches in diameter.
3. Place as many "fingers" as possible on a skewer, leaving a 1-inch space between each piece.
4. Cook over hot coals for 10-15 minutes, turning frequently until fully cooked through.
5. Take pita bread and slide the gyro into the center.
6. Drizzle with sauce.
7. Fold over to eat.
Sauce: Tzatziki
1 cup Yogurt
1 tablespoon Mayo
Juice of 1 Lemon
2 scallions including green tops (finely chopped)
Cucumber (minced)
5 cloves Garlic (minced)
Mix well.
